isolation.boundary: Read-only interaction with shared app/DB; no global DB mutations

assertions.title: Glossary Tooltips

steps.action: Open homepage and navigate via the 'Introduction to Algorithms and Data Structures' article link
steps.expected: Article detail page loads with glossary-tooltipped terms

steps.action: Inspect article DOM for tooltip anchors and term wrapping
steps.expected: First occurrence of each glossary term wrapped in <a class="tooltip"> with title and glossary link
steps.observed: DOM audit found tooltipCount=0 and no glossary anchor links in article content

steps.expected: First occurrence wrapped, subsequent occurrences unwrapped
steps.observed: Occurrences of 'algorithm', 'variable', and 'array' were present only as unwrapped text

steps.action: Review network activity for glossary-related data
steps.observed: No glossary endpoint requests were captured during article render

evidence.network: GET /api/articles/introduction-to-algorithms (+ related/settings/categories/auth calls); no glossary requests captured

assertions.issues: Glossary tooltip wrapping is missing on article detail content; contract requirement for <a class='tooltip'> title/href behavior is not met.

steps.action: Set viewport to 320x900 and verify layout
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow; navigation remains accessible
steps.observed: scrollWidth matched viewport width (320); mobile header showed an 'Open menu' control and menu exposed nav links when opened

steps.action: Set viewport to 768x900 and verify layout
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow; navigation readable and accessible
steps.observed: scrollWidth matched viewport width (768); header nav links were visible and usable

steps.action: Set viewport to 1024x900 and verify layout
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow; navigation readable and accessible
steps.observed: scrollWidth matched viewport width (1024); header nav links visible

steps.action: Set viewport to 1440x900 and verify layout
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow; navigation readable and accessible
steps.observed: scrollWidth matched viewport width (1440); header nav links visible

frictions.description: Guidance references an article title with URI-like text ending in 'and-data-structures', but direct navigation to that URI returned the not-found page. The assertion was validated by navigating from the homepage article link instead.
frictions.resolution: Used homepage link for 'Introduction to Algorithms and Data Structures' to reach canonical URI /article/introduction-to-algorithms.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-XCUT-003), 1 failed (VAL-DETAIL-008 due to missing glossary tooltip wrapping).
